title: SundaraKandam: Hanuman's Divine Mission
subtitle: Retold for the Modern Devotional Reader
description:
SundaraKandam is the most uplifting and hope-filled chapter of the Ramayana. It reveals the boundless power of devotion, courage, humility and unwavering faith in Shri Rama, as shown through Hanuman.

This book is a simple, heartfelt retelling of Sundarakandam, written especially for today's devotional reader. The timeless events are narrated in clear and easy yet simple English language, making them accessible to all age groups while preserving their sacred essence.

Through Hanuman's leap across the ocean, his discovery of Sita Devi, his fearless entry into Lanka and his unshakable surrender to Shri Rama, readers are gently guided to understand the boundless power of devotion.
